## What You Tried

Mention the menu option or command you already used.

Examples:

```sh
make ROOT_DIR=../libft
make ROOT_DIR=../libft build
./libft_tester --only ft_split --verbose
./libft_tester --review --seed 42
./libft_tester --config .libft-tester.json --review
```
